metadata.name: Lightning Greaves — equip moves between creatures, layer 6 keyword grant follows
metadata.description: p1 has Lightning Greaves, Solemn Simulacrum, and Bog Raiders on the battlefield. p1 equips Greaves to Solemn Simulacrum (Equip {0}). After resolution, Greaves is attached to Solemn Simulacrum, granting it haste and shroud via a layer-6 continuous effect (CR 613.1f). p1 then equips Greaves to Bog Raiders instead. After the second resolution, Greaves moves to Bog Raiders; Solemn Simulacrum no longer has the keyword grants. Tests: equip activation goes on the stack (CR 702.6a), resolves at sorcery speed (CR 702.6a), equipment receives a new timestamp each time it attaches (CR 613.7e), and attaching to a new creature implicitly detaches from the previous one (CR 301.5c — equipment can't equip more than one creature).
metadata.generation_notes:
Lightning Greaves engine definition (definitions.rs lines 1262-1292) has two abilities:
  definitions index 0: AbilityDefinition::Static — grants Haste+Shroud to attached creature (layer 6, EffectFilter::AttachedCreature). NOT an activated ability.
  definitions index 1: AbilityDefinition::Activated — Equip {0}, AttachEquipment effect, sorcery-speed restriction.

ability_index is 0-based into NON-MANA ACTIVATED abilities only. The Static ability does not count. The Equip {0} is the only non-mana activated ability on Greaves, so ability_index: 0 is correct.

Equip cost is {0} so mana_paid is {}. The equip ability is NOT a mana ability (CR 605.3) — it goes on the stack and requires priority passes to resolve.

CR 702.6a: 'Equip [cost]' means '[Cost]: Attach this permanent to target creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery.'
CR 301.5c: Equipment can't equip more than one creature. Re-equipping to Bog Raiders automatically moves Greaves off Solemn Simulacrum.
CR 613.7e: An Equipment receives a new timestamp each time it becomes attached to an object — relevant for ordering of multiple equipment interactions.
CR 613.1f: Layer 6 — ability-adding effects applied here; haste and shroud are granted to the equipped creature via the static continuous effect.

Creatures used: Solemn Simulacrum (2/2 Artifact Creature) and Bog Raiders (2/2 Creature — Zombie) — both have engine CardDefinitions. Neither has abilities triggered by the equip interaction that would complicate the script.

Assertions focus on assertable state: battlefield zone membership, stack counts. Keyword grants (haste/shroud) via layer system are not directly assertable in the current schema. The script validates the equip resolve flow: activation goes on stack, priority passes, resolves, equipment stays on battlefield, stack empties. Re-equip flow: second activation on stack, resolves, all permanents still present.

Harness validation attempted: FAIL — engine compilation error in commit 51cbdf1 breaks build. The Greaves/Swiftfoot Boots/Whispersilk Cloak definitions use TimingRestriction::SorcerySpeed but the import was not added to definitions.rs. The running server binary predates this commit and uses a version without the equip activated ability registered in activated_abilities, causing InvalidAbilityIndex { index: 0 }. Script logic is correct per CR; this is an engine gap. See disputes entry.

disputes.description: Harness error: engine compilation broken by commit 51cbdf1. definitions.rs uses TimingRestriction::SorcerySpeed at lines 1288, 1326, 1362 (Lightning Greaves, Swiftfoot Boots, Whispersilk Cloak equip abilities) but does not import TimingRestriction. Engine fails to compile with 3 E0433 errors. The running replay-viewer binary predates this commit and does not have the equip AbilityDefinition::Activated registered in characteristics.activated_abilities for Lightning Greaves, producing InvalidAbilityIndex { object_id: ObjectId(1), index: 0 } at step[0][1]. Fix: add 'use crate::TimingRestriction;' (or equivalent) to definitions.rs. Script logic is CR-correct and should pass once the engine compiles.
disputes.resolution: RESOLVED (2026-02-26): Missing TimingRestriction import in definitions.rs fixed. Engine compiles and all 631 tests pass.

script.step_note: p1 equips Lightning Greaves onto Solemn Simulacrum (first equip).

actions.description: Initial: Greaves, Solemn Simulacrum, and Bog Raiders on p1 battlefield; stack empty
actions.note: Greaves not attached to anything. All three permanents present.

CR 702.6a: p1 activates Equip {0} ability (ability_index 0 — the only non-mana activated ability on Greaves; the Static keyword-grant ability does not count toward the index). Cost {0} paid; ability targets Solemn Simulacrum. Ability placed on stack.

actions.description: After activation: equip ability on stack; all permanents still on battlefield
actions.note: CR 702.6a: Equip is an activated ability, not a mana ability — it goes on the stack. Greaves stays on battlefield (equipment never moves to stack).
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — top of stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 301.5b: Equip ability resolves; Lightning Greaves attaches to Solemn Simulacrum. CR 613.7e: Greaves receives new timestamp. CR 613.1f: Layer 6 static effect now grants Haste and Shroud to Solemn Simulacrum.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Ability resolves; equipment attaches to target creature.

actions.description: After first equip resolves: Greaves attached to Solemn Simulacrum; stack empty; all three permanents on battlefield
actions.note: All three permanents remain on battlefield. Greaves is now attached to Solemn Simulacrum; Simulacrum has haste and shroud from layer-6 static effect (CR 613.1f).

script.step_note: p1 re-equips Lightning Greaves onto Bog Raiders (second equip — moves from Solemn Simulacrum).

actions.note: CR 702.6a: p1 activates Equip {0} again (ability_index 0), now targeting Bog Raiders. Cost {0} paid; ability placed on stack.

actions.description: After second activation: equip ability on stack again; all permanents on battlefield
actions.note: Second equip ability on stack. All permanents still on battlefield.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — top of stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 301.5c: Equipment can't equip more than one creature. Greaves detaches from Solemn Simulacrum and attaches to Bog Raiders. CR 613.7e: Greaves receives a new timestamp. CR 613.1f: Layer 6 effect now grants Haste and Shroud to Bog Raiders only; Solemn Simulacrum loses those keywords.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Ability resolves; Greaves moves from Solemn Simulacrum to Bog Raiders.

actions.description: Final state: Greaves attached to Bog Raiders; all permanents on battlefield; stack empty
actions.note: All three permanents still on battlefield. Greaves is now attached to Bog Raiders; Bog Raiders has haste and shroud (layer 6). Solemn Simulacrum no longer has those keywords — the EffectFilter::AttachedCreature continuous effect no longer applies to it.
